name: Navy Unstructured Blazer

why: Instantly upgrades shirts, knits, and tees without feeling formal.

name: Olive Cotton Chore Jacket
fit: straight body, room for knit layer
why: A relaxed layer that makes simple clothes look intentionally styled.

name: Charcoal Merino Knit Polo
why: Reads more dressed than a tee but stays comfortable all day.

name: White Oxford Button-Down
why: The safest high-compatibility shirt for meetings and dinners.

name: Slate Stretch Wool Trouser
fit: tapered, no break or slight break
why: Comfortable enough for lazy mornings but polished enough for work.

name: Dark Rinse Tapered Denim
fit: room in thigh, tapered below knee
why: The low-effort evening base that still looks grown-up.

name: Clean Leather Sneaker
why: Works with trousers, denim, and casual tailoring.

name: Brown Suede Derby
care: brush and protect with suede spray
why: Adds texture and maturity without looking stiff.

name: Oxblood Leather Belt
why: A quiet accent that pairs with navy, grey, olive, and denim.

name: Stone Packable Rain Shell
why: Stops bad weather from ruining the only outfit you planned.

why: Adds personality while still matching navy, stone, denim, and olive.

why: Finishes outfits without making the user think about jewelry.
